message:
feat(extensions): UTF-8 exec stream rewrite, JS comment stripping for regex/templates, Unicode edit normalization

Exec stream UTF-8 robustness:
- extension_dispatcher.rs: replace BufReader::read_until with fixed 4096-byte
  buffer + partial UTF-8 buffer; proper boundary detection using from_utf8()
  error semantics to distinguish incomplete sequences (wait for more) from
  invalid bytes (lossy flush); sync channel buffer increased 256 → 1024 frames;
  24 protocol error code tests + 8 method parser tests + output normalization tests

JS comment stripping for regex and template literals:
- extensions.rs: introduce ScannerState tracking in_block_comment, in_template,
  last_significant_char; rewrite strip_js_comments() to preserve comments inside
  regex literals (e.g. /[//]/) and template literals across multiple lines;
  track last significant char to disambiguate / as regex start vs division;
  handle regex character classes [...] correctly; 6 new tests

Unicode normalization for edit matching:
- tools.rs: edit tool now generates NFC/NFD variants of old_text before fuzzy
  matching; pre-computes normalized content once, tries variants sequentially;
  handles LLM output and clipboard Unicode normalization differences gracefully

- extensions_js.rs: minor import organization and whitespace formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
